text: Hello? Are you there? Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Florida State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? Well, I really want to help you get this taken care of as these benefits are time sensitive. So, you do have Medicare Part A and B, right? Can you hear me? I was just asking if you have Medicare Part A and Part B. So, before I could transfer you, let me check your eligibility for the new benefits that we have. That includes food cards, cash benefits of up to $300, flex cards, and very low premiums. After confirming your status, I'll be able to transfer you to the next step. So, you're currently enrolled in both Part A and Part B, correct?
